MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Krista Kamper, Esq. for Plaintiff: GlobalEnglish Corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Michael Penderglast, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Individual Training, S.p.A. and Massimo vinciguerra as follows:
Damages $400,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $72,000.00
Attorney's Fees $29,765.84
Costs $1,917.43, for a total of $503,682.27
Judgment signed in open court.
